brand_rules: Brand palette: blush #FFE9EC, deep red #850914, white #FFFFFF, black #000000 (source: brand color reference).
Aesthetic: elegant, feminine, Mediterranean/European resort — occasion and bridal wear.
Products are named by style (e.g. Charlotte, Francesca, Amara); pair a product image with lifestyle of the same style name when available (match on tags/style name).
Lifestyle/editorial imagery is 4:5 portrait (896x1152) — good for hero and full-bleed blocks.
Product shots come from Shopify CDN and sit on white/neutral backgrounds — safe on any email background.
Prefer pairing product colors with complementary palette accents (blush, deep red).
